description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines two jobs in the build stage, named build_image and pages. The build_image job runs on the docker image with a docker:dind service, is allowed to fail, and is limited to scheduled pipelines (only: schedules); it logs in to the GitLab Container Registry using $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD, builds the image with tag $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE, and pushes it. The pages job uses the image built in the previous job ($CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE), runs on runners tagged gitlab-org, executes `python3 ./waf configure --prefix=`pwd`/public/ build install` followed by a find‑gzip command that compresses HTML, text, JS and CSS files under the public directory, and then publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact. No caches or additional artifacts are defined beyond the pages artifact.
